cities.name: Dallas / Arlington
cities.advisory: Do not choose downtown lodging without a confirmed matchday transfer.
cities.stadiumReality: AT&T Stadium is in Arlington, not downtown Dallas. Travelers staying in Dallas should confirm matchday transport before leaving their hotel.
cities.heatCopy: June and July temperatures in Dallas regularly exceed 35–38°C. Plan hydration, sunscreen, shaded waiting time, and post-match exit delays.

transportOptions.warning: Confirm booking before matchday. This is the most predictable option.
transportOptions.action: Check official host city site for shuttle booking.

transportOptions.warning: Post-match surge pricing can be significant. Pickup zones may be far from exits. Expect 60–90+ min waits.
transportOptions.action: Have a backup plan. Do not rely on rideshare as your only option.

transportOptions.warning: Parking must be pre-booked. Road closures and post-match traffic can extend exit times significantly.
transportOptions.action: Pre-book parking only. No walk-up parking assumption.

transportOptions.warning: No direct rail connection between downtown Dallas and AT&T Stadium.
transportOptions.action: Do not assume rail will solve matchday movement.

hotelZones.pros: Best restaurant and nightlife access, easy airport connection
hotelZones.risks: No rail to stadium, rideshare surge likely, 20-mile transfer each way
hotelZones.action: Confirm shuttle or transfer before booking downtown hotel.

hotelZones.risks: Limited dining and city experience outside matchdays
hotelZones.action: Good option if stadium access is your priority.

hotelZones.risks: Far from both downtown and stadium, requires two transfers
hotelZones.action: Only if flight timing makes it necessary.

hotelZones.risks: Adds complexity to stadium transfer on matchday
hotelZones.action: Plan transfer carefully. Not walking distance to stadium.

dynamicFields.bagPolicy: Check official stadium policy before matchday.

stadiumRules.bagPolicy: Clear bag required. Maximum size 12" x 6" x 12". No backpacks.
stadiumRules.idRequired: Valid government-issued photo ID required for all ticket holders.
stadiumRules.alcoholPolicy: Alcohol available for purchase inside stadium.
stadiumRules.foodPolicy: No outside food or beverages permitted.

stadiumFood.notes: Stadium is cashless. No cash accepted at any vendor.

queueTimes.source: General stadium guidance. Verify closer to matchday.

postMatchInfo.drivingExitAdvice: Expect significant delays. Plan at least 60 minutes to exit the stadium area.

cities.name: Boston / Foxborough
cities.advisory: Treat this as a regional trip, not a simple Boston city match.
cities.stadiumReality: Gillette Stadium is in Foxborough, approximately 30 miles south of Boston. It is a suburban venue requiring regional transport planning.
cities.heatCopy: Boston summer temperatures are generally mild. Heat is a lower risk here than other host cities.

transportOptions.warning: Special matchday service will run but capacity is limited. Book early.
transportOptions.action: Check MBTA matchday schedule. This is the recommended option.

transportOptions.warning: Confirm booking and pickup location before matchday.
transportOptions.action: Check official host city site for shuttle details.

transportOptions.warning: Parking is limited and must be pre-booked. Post-match exit is slow.
transportOptions.action: Pre-book only. Expect significant post-match delays.

hotelZones.pros: Best city experience, walkable, good dining
hotelZones.risks: Requires commuter rail or shuttle to stadium, 30 miles away
hotelZones.action: Confirm MBTA matchday service before booking.

hotelZones.risks: Very limited hotel options, book early
hotelZones.action: Book immediately if this is your preference. Limited supply.

cities.heatCopy: Miami in June and July combines heat with high humidity. Heat index can exceed 40°C. Plan accordingly for queues, outdoor waits, and post-match exits.

transportOptions.warning: Post-match surge pricing likely. Heat makes outdoor waiting uncomfortable.

transportOptions.warning: Post-match traffic on major routes is significant.

transportOptions.warning: Requires transfer. Plan route in advance.
